case_title: ADRIANA VALDIVIEZ VS. ANDREW J KELLY

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION AND DECLARATION FOR ORDER (DOMESTIC VIOLENCE) FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED VALDIVIEZ, ADRIANA AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED KELLY, ANDREW J

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (CLETS) ON AUG-21-2002 GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER - PET IN PRO PER. N/A RESP. PET PROVIDES VALID POS. PET SWORN. THE COURT GRANTS THE PET A STANDARD CONDUCT, 3YR RESTRAINING ORDER AGAINST THE RESP FOR HER RESIDENCE, PLACE OF BUSINESS AS REQUESTED IN THE APPLICATION. TAPE RECORDING AND VIDEO RECORDING OF ANY ATTEMPTS BY RESP TO VIOLATE THE CONDITIONS OF THE ORDER ARE ALLOWED. THE COURT SHALL PREPARE THE ORDER.
PROOF OF SERVICE RE: OSC AND TRO FILED BY PETITIONER VALDIVIEZ, ADRIANA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (CLETS) FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED VALDIVIEZ, ADRIANA AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED KELLY, ANDREW J HEARING SET FOR AUG-21-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 404
RESTRAINING ORDER AFTER HEARING, CLETS FILED BY OTHER SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT
